title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Brigade Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Brigade Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Brigade Group are looking for an experienced Sales Manager based out of Faridabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Brigade Group:
Brigade Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Brigade Group!
